# Weekly Investment Recommendations
**Week 26, 2026** (2026-06-22 – 2026-06-26)

> Strategy: Swedish small/midcap stocks · 13,000 SEK bankroll · 1–2% risk per trade · Manual execution

> **Regenerated 2026-06-27** (original report date 2026-06-26)

## Portfolio Overview

| | |
|---|---|
| Bankroll (strategy) | **13,000 SEK** |
| Portfolio value (cash + positions) | **12,023 SEK** |
| Cash | 5,176 SEK (40% of bankroll) |
| Invested | 6,848 SEK (53% of bankroll) |
| Drawdown from peak | 7.5% |
| Risk mode | **CAUTION — half size (drawdown 5–10%)** |

## Portfolio Risk Summary

| | |
|---|---|
| Portfolio heat | **2.8%** of capital at open risk (limit: 8.0%) |
| Cash available | 5,176 SEK (40% of capital) |
| Sector exposure | Healthcare 31%, Utilities 26% |

| Sharpe ratio (annualized) | 1.736 ↑ +0.60 |

## Buy Recommendations

### 1. Clas Ohlson AB (publ) (CLAS-B.ST)

| | |
|---|---|
| Score | **+357** (−1000…+1000) |
| Current price | 423.20 SEK |
| **Buy range** | **417.92 – 428.48 SEK** |
| **Stop-loss range** | **403.39 – 407.36 SEK** |
| **Target range** | **523.83 – 556.23 SEK** (+24%) |
| Suggested shares | 6 |
| Suggested allocation | 2,539 SEK |
| Max risk at stop | ~95 SEK (0.7% of capital) |
| Risk mode | caution |
| **Valid until** | **2026-06-30** (2 trading days) |

**Score breakdown**: Momentum 1M=76 · 3M=68 · 6M=98 · RSI=57 (score=98) · Trend=83 · Volume=100 · Sharpe(1Y)=+1.02 · MaxDD=27.0%
**Category scores** (±1000): Tech=+106 · Val=-60 · Qual=+221 · Safety=+0 · Growth=+90 · Sent=+0 · Panel=n/a
**Entry timing**: ok

**Thesis**: Moderate 3M momentum; cheap valuation (P/FCF 14×); positive FCF trend
**Suggested hold**: 5 weeks

**Valuation**: P/E(ttm)=23.2 · P/E(fwd)=33.2 · EV/EBITDA=15.8 · P/FCF=13.9 · PEG=3.1 · P/B=8.5 · ROE=42.1% · Div=2.2% · P/S=2.1 · Analyst target=415.00 SEK · Upside=-2% · *adj via blend(pe_trailing,ev_ebitda,p_fcf,price_to_book)*
Fundamentals: Rev +11% YoY | ROIC 37% | ND/EBITDA 0.0× | Cash conv 1.66 | Gross margin 48% | Op margin 7%
**Short interest**: 1.6% float · ratio —
**FCF Screen** (4yr): Margin=15.5% (target ≥8%) ✓ · Trend=✓ · Cycle-resilient=✓ · → Strong FCF candidate

**Podcast signals**:
- **BUY** (moderate) — Nordea utfärdade köprekommendation; aktien steg över 5% efter att ha pressats efter sin senaste rapport. — *"Claes Olsson, som jag brukar säga är en konkurrent, stiger istället över 5%. Det är efter en köpreko"*
- **HOLD** (weak) — Raised operating margin target to 12% (confidence signal), but record profitability is questioned for durability and top-line growth (~9%) underwhelms. — *"Härom veckan så höjde man ju faktiskt marginalmålet. Till just 12%. Kommer det hålla?"*
- **WATCH** (weak) — Discussed as a likely beneficiary of the new EU EUR3-per-item parcel tariff that erodes Temu/AliExpress price advantage. — *"Klaus Olsson och Rusta. Men de tar in dem på ett helt annat sätt. Och de kommer ju inte bli belastad"*

> **Note**: stop distance is sized from the recommendation close (423.20 SEK). If filled outside the buy range, recalculate stop as: `fill_price × (1 − 1.5 × 3.1% ATR)` = 408.43 SEK at buy-range upper.

- **BUY** (strong) — Best-in-class GPU leader with 80% growth and 80% gross margins, dominant 90% GPU share, investing internally and in suppliers to defend position. — *"Självklart tror jag på Nvidia framåt, det är inga konstigheter."*

### NVDA (Nvidia)
- **BUY** (strong) — Victor's single top pick; trades ~20x earnings, cheap given growth, strong AI moat and fewer idiosyncratic risks than Alphabet. — *"Jag vill välja Nvidia. ... Och Nvidia handlar om start 20. Det är bara otroligt billigt i förhålland"*

- **BUY** (strong) — World's largest battery maker (~45% share) at ~2.5-3% FCF yield, ~12% structural growth; Peter's fund took a large position. — *"Det blir förmodligen standard oil i den här framtiden med elektrificering."*

### HPQ (Hewlett Packard)
- **BUY** (strong) — PE 6, ~17% total shareholder yield, AI PC upgrade cycle; earnings could double over 5 years implying ~15%/yr return. — *"Hewlett Packard är ju en klassisk köd- och kartoffel- och value-aktie den handlar price-earning 6 oc"*

### DSV (DSV)
